narrative.description: Nintendo's N64 launch title invented the 3D platformer template with free camera movement, star-gated hub worlds, and analog-accurate jumps across Peach's Castle and its painted portals.
narrative.core_loop: Enter portrait worlds from the castle hub, collect Power Stars to unlock new areas, master Mario's expanded move set, and defeat Bowser in multi-phase arena fights.

mechanics.map_notes: Lakitu cam and analog control define 3D traversal and jump arcs.
mechanics.expression: Lakitu cam and analog control define 3D traversal and jump arcs.

mechanics.map_notes: Peach's Castle hub connects to portrait worlds gated by star totals.
mechanics.expression: Peach's Castle hub connects to portrait worlds gated by star totals.

mechanics.map_notes: Power Stars gate castle doors, cap blocks, and Bowser encounters.
mechanics.expression: Power Stars gate castle doors, cap blocks, and Bowser encounters.

mechanics.map_notes: Long jumps, wall kicks, and dive catches demand exact analog input.
mechanics.expression: Long jumps, wall kicks, and dive catches demand exact analog input.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser keys from three Bowser fights unlock upper castle floors.
mechanics.expression: Bowser keys from three Bowser fights unlock upper castle floors.

mechanics.map_notes: Each Bowser fight adds grab-throw and hazard phase mechanics.
mechanics.expression: Each Bowser fight adds grab-throw and hazard phase mechanics.

mechanics.map_notes: 100-coin stars, red coins, and secret slides extend completion.
mechanics.expression: 100-coin stars, red coins, and secret slides extend completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Vanish, metal, and wing caps alter movement and access.
mechanics.expression: Vanish, metal, and wing caps alter movement and access.

mechanics.map_notes: Lava, ice, and toxic clouds test movement mastery.
mechanics.expression: Lava, ice, and toxic clouds test movement mastery.

mechanics.map_notes: Stars save progress; death respawns at course entrance.
mechanics.expression: Stars save progress; death respawns at course entrance.

mechanics.map_notes: Cap blocks require corresponding cap power-ups to access.
mechanics.expression: Cap blocks require corresponding cap power-ups to access.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser cycles through jump-stomp, bomb throw, and tail grab patterns.
mechanics.expression: Bowser cycles through jump-stomp, bomb throw, and tail grab patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser's fire breath telegraphs with visible inhale animation.
mechanics.expression: Bowser's fire breath telegraphs with visible inhale animation.

mechanics.map_notes: Punch, kick, and dive attack clear fodder enemies.
mechanics.expression: Punch, kick, and dive attack clear fodder enemies.

mechanics.map_notes: Health pie depletes on hazard hits; stars persist on death.
mechanics.expression: Health pie depletes on hazard hits; stars persist on death.

mechanics.map_notes: Hoot owl and Lakitu rides alter traversal in select courses.
mechanics.expression: Hoot owl and Lakitu rides alter traversal in select courses.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Super Mario 64 through its core platformer loop.
